sql--sql-v2--draft.title: SQL Foundations
sql--sql-v2--draft.description: Learn SQL from the beginning by reading tables, selecting useful columns, filtering rows, sorting results, handling missing data, and combining those skills in a focused customer-report capstone.

sql-v2-0.title: Getting Started with SQL and Databases
sql-v2-0.description: Understand what databases store, how tables organize records, and how the SQL workspace turns a question into a result.
outcomes: Explain what SQL is used for in real applications.
Identify tables, rows, columns, records, and fields.
Read simple table data and describe what it means.
Use the browser SQL workspace to run a beginner query.
why: Understand what databases store, how tables organize records, and how the SQL workspace turns a question into a result.
The work in this module becomes part of the next cumulative report or project.

sql-v2-1.title: Your First Queries with SELECT
sql-v2-1.description: Build readable SELECT statements by choosing columns deliberately and reading one table at a time.
outcomes: Write SELECT queries that retrieve data from one table.
Choose specific columns instead of always selecting every column.
Use FROM to identify the table being queried.
Read a query result table and explain what was returned.
why: Build readable SELECT statements by choosing columns deliberately and reading one table at a time.
The work in this module becomes part of the next cumulative report or project.

sql-v2-2.title: Filtering Data with WHERE
sql-v2-2.description: Filter rows with comparison operators, logical conditions, ranges, and exact text rules.
outcomes: Use WHERE to return only rows that match a condition.
Compare text and numbers with beginner SQL operators.
Combine conditions with AND, OR, and NOT.
Debug common filtering mistakes in simple SQL queries.
why: Filter rows with comparison operators, logical conditions, ranges, and exact text rules.
The work in this module becomes part of the next cumulative report or project.

sql-v2-3.title: Sorting and Limiting Results
sql-v2-3.description: Sort results predictably, add tie-breakers, and limit a report to the rows that matter most.
outcomes: Sort query results with ORDER BY.
Use ASC and DESC to control sort direction.
Use LIMIT to show a smaller result set.
Combine filtering, sorting, and limiting in one query.
why: Sort results predictably, add tie-breakers, and limit a report to the rows that matter most.
The work in this module becomes part of the next cumulative report or project.

sql-v2-4.title: Working with Text, Lists, Ranges, and NULL
sql-v2-4.description: Work with text patterns and missing values without confusing NULL with an empty string.
outcomes: Search partial text with LIKE and wildcards.
Filter multiple values with IN and NOT IN.
Filter ranges with BETWEEN.
Find missing and present values with IS NULL and IS NOT NULL.
why: Work with text patterns and missing values without confusing NULL with an empty string.
The work in this module becomes part of the next cumulative report or project.

sql-v2-5.title: Capstone: Customer Follow-Up Report
sql-v2-5.description: Combine selection, filtering, pattern matching, NULL handling, sorting, and limiting in one customer follow-up capstone.
outcomes: Combine selection, filtering, ordering, and limiting in one practical query flow.
Revise a working query without losing earlier progress.
Build a clean report that highlights real customer follow-up needs.
why: Combine selection, filtering, pattern matching, NULL handling, sorting, and limiting in one customer follow-up capstone.
The final work demonstrates the complete course workflow.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-1.title: What SQL Is
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-1.description: Understand what SQL means, what databases are, and why SQL is useful.
bullets: SQL helps answer questions about data
Real systems use databases every day

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-2.title: Understanding Tables
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-2.description: Learn how rows, columns, records, fields, and names make table data readable.
bullets: Names help you understand the table

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-3.title: Database Thinking
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-3.description: Practice thinking about data as questions, structure, and reliable identifiers.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-4.title: First SQL Environment
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-4.description: Use the Zoeskoul SQL workspace to run queries and read result tables.
bullets: Use the Tables view as support

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-module-proje.title: Module Project
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-0-module-proje.description: Apply the module introduction by exploring a student roster.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-1.title: SELECT and FROM
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-1.description: Build complete single-table queries by choosing result columns and naming the source table.
bullets: Use SELECT to define result columns
Use FROM to identify the source table

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-2.title: Choosing Result Columns
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-2.description: Choose between every column and a focused explicit column list.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-3.title: Readable Multi-Column Queries
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-3.description: Arrange and format several selected columns for a clear result.
bullets: Review the result shape before running

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-4.title: Predicting and Debugging
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-4.description: Predict what a query will return and repair common syntax mistakes.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-module-proje.title: Module Project
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-1-module-proje.description: Learn module 1 product starter sheet project through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Choose only the product columns needed for a clear starter report.
Arrange selected columns in an intentional, readable order.
Write a complete SELECT and FROM query without syntax errors.
Deliver the Module 1 Product Starter Sheet.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-1.title: WHERE and Exact Matching
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-1.description: Filter source rows and use exact or not-equal comparisons.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-2.title: Numeric and Typed Comparisons
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-2.description: Choose strict or inclusive boundaries and match the value type.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-3.title: Combining Conditions
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-3.description: Use AND, OR, NOT, and parentheses without changing the intended logic.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-4.title: Filtering Debugging
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-4.description: Test filter logic and repair common condition mistakes.
bullets: Add conditions one at a time
Distinguish valid syntax from correct logic

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-module-proje.title: Module Project
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-2-module-proje.description: Learn module 2 inventory watchlist project through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Filter product rows with exact, boundary, text, number, and date comparisons.
Combine business rules with AND, OR, parentheses, and NOT.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-1.title: ORDER BY Fundamentals
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-1.description: Understand what sorting changes and where ORDER BY belongs.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-2.title: Sort Directions
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-2.description: Use ASC and DESC with text, numeric, and date values.
bullets: Choose direction from the reporting goal

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-3.title: Multi-Column Sorting
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-3.description: Use primary and secondary sort columns to make ties predictable.
bullets: Read sort columns left to right

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-4.title: Ranked and Limited Results
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-4.description: Combine filtering, sorting, and LIMIT to build useful top or bottom lists.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-module-proje.title: Module Project
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-3-module-proje.description: Learn module 3 sales leaderboard project through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Sort results in ascending or descending order for the reporting goal.
Use primary and secondary sort keys for predictable output.
Combine ORDER BY and LIMIT to create a useful ranking.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-1.title: Text Patterns
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-1.description: Search prefixes, suffixes, fragments, and fixed character positions.
bullets: Choose the wildcard that matches the requirement

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-2.title: Lists and Ranges
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-2.description: Filter several exact choices and inclusive ranges.
bullets: Combine list or range filters with other rules

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-3.title: Missing Values
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-3.description: Understand NULL and test missing values correctly.
bullets: Distinguish NULL from zero or empty text
Find missing values with IS NULL
Explain what a missing value means

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-4.title: Cleanup Filters
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-4.description: Require present values and combine text, status, and missing-data rules.
bullets: Apply text patterns to present values

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-module-proje.title: Module Project
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-4-module-proje.description: Learn module 4 customer cleanup project through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Search text with LIKE, percent, and underscore patterns.
Filter value lists and inclusive ranges with IN, NOT IN, and BETWEEN.
Handle missing values with IS NULL and IS NOT NULL.
Deliver the Module 4 Customer Cleanup report.

sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-5-capstone-pro.title: Capstone Project
sql--sql-v2--draft-sql-v2-5-capstone-pro.description: Learn module 5 customer follow-up capstone through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Translate a stakeholder request into the required result columns and filters.
Combine list, range, text-pattern, and NULL checks in one query.
Sort and limit the result into a usable customer follow-up queue.
Deliver the final Customer Follow-Up Capstone report.
